name: RABBIT’S SPEED
description: Within seconds of downing this potion, you feel a distinct lightness and spring in your step. Your Speed increases by 5 feet for the next 10 minutes.

name: WEAPON MASTER’S ELIXIR
description: When you drink this potion, you gain a sense of clarity and focus. The swing of a certain weapon becomes second nature to you. For the next 24 hours, you have proficiency with a Melee weapon of your choice.

name: SPIRIT OF SALYRI
description: This potion is said to contain the spirit of Salyri, a great Obojiman warrior known for her fighting prowess. Anyone who drinks this potion gains a certain understanding of how to effectively wear armor in combat. For the next 24 hours, you have training with Shields or one type of armor of your choice.

name: BEAST HIDE
description: Drinking this potion thickens your skin and grows patches of fur all around your body. Frost that would normally freeze your skin instead melts on contact. For 1 minute, you have Resistance to Cold damage.

name: SPIRIT ARMOR
description: When poured on a creature that isn’t wearing armor, this potion covers the target with a magical force. For the next hour, the target has an Armor Class of 15 if its AC is lower than that. This effect ends early if the target dons armor.

name: DISPLACEMENT FIELD
description: Drinking this silvery, glittering potion causes you to shimmer and flicker, making you appear to be standing next to your actual location. Until the start of your next turn, all attack rolls against you are made with Disadvantage.

name: SHEPHERD’S BANE
description: It is said that this potion was first brewed in the Gale Fields by a young shepherd looking to protect their flock. The irony was not lost on them when they drank the potion and took on wolflike features. When you drink this potion, you grow claws which last for 1 hour. For the duration, when you use your Unarmed Strike to deal damage with the claws, they deal Slashing damage equal to 1d6 plus your Strength modifier instead of dealing the normal damage for your Unarmed Strike.

name: BOTTLED BOMB
description: When thrown at a point you can see within 60 feet of you, this volatile liquid explodes. Each creature within 5 feet of that point must make a DC 14 Dexterity saving throw, taking 1d8 Force damage on a failed save or half as much damage on a successful one.

name: WONDER JUICE
description: When you drink this multicolored potion, you instantly feel magical. For 1 minute, everything you are wearing or carrying is considered magical, and your weapons and Unarmed Strikes deal Force damage instead of their normal type.

name: CANDLECAP
description: After imbibing this potion, you gain lively flaming locks, which last for 1 hour and shed Bright Light in a 20-foot radius and Dim Light for an additional 20 feet. Once on each of your turns for the duration, you can cause an Unarmed Strike made with your head to deal an extra 1d4 Fire damage. Additionally, you can take a Magic action to cause the flame on your head to burst outward, dealing 2d4 Fire damage to each creature (other than you) in a 5-foot Emanation originating from you; doing so causes the effects of this potion to end early.

name: EAGLE’S VISION
description: When you drink this potion, your eyes grow slightly larger and turn the golden color of an eagle. For the next minute, attacking at long range doesn’t impose Disadvantage on your ranged attack rolls with weapons.

name: PARANOIA
description: When you drink this potion, you gain heightened senses along with the sneaking suspicion that you are being stalked. For the next 8 hours, you can’t be surprised.

name: BOTTLED TORCH
description: When uncorked, this potion spews a hot, yellow flame from its bottle for 1 minute, which resembles the shape of a blade. For the duration, you can attack with the fiery blade, which counts as a Simple Melee weapon. It deals 2d4 Fire damage on a hit and has the Finesse property. The blade disappears early if it is submerged in water.

name: STATIC SHOCK
description: This potion makes you feel tingly as it charges you up with static electricity. Immediately after a creature touches you or hits you with a melee attack using a metal weapon in the next 24 hours, you can take a Reaction to send a charge of static electricity back at that creature, dealing 1d10 Lightning damage to it. Once you do so, the effects of this potion end.

name: INCOMING!
description: Upon drinking this potion, you become hyperaware of threats from afar and your reflexes snap into action, empowering you to slip out of harm’s way or knock missiles aside. For 1 minute, you gain a +2 bonus to AC against ranged attack rolls.

name: LIGHTNING BREATH
description: After drinking this shimmering gold liquid, your voice gains a crackling quality and your breath sparks and sputters for 24 hours. For the duration, you can take a Bonus Action to exhale an arc of lightning at a creature you can see within 30 feet of you. The target must make a DC 12 Dexterity saving throw, taking 1d10 Lightning damage on a failed save or half as much damage on a successful one. Once you exhale this lightning, the effects of this potion end.

name: HEROISM
description: When you drink this glowing red elixir, you gain Advantage on the next attack roll you make within the next 24 hours.

name: SLUGSKIN
description: Drinking this potion makes your skin thick, slippery, and rubbery. For 1 minute, you have Resistance to Piercing damage. While the potion is active, you can choose to exude a slime trail as part of your movement.

name: THUNDERBELCH
description: Upon ingesting this fiercely fizzing potion, roll a d4 to determine the number of rounds before you let forth a thunderous belch of epic proportions. On your turn that round, you must use your action to release the belch; if you have the Incapacitated condition or otherwise can’t take an action at that time, the potion’s magic fades with no effect. Each creature other than you in a 10-foot Emanation originating from you must make a DC 14 Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, a creature takes 3d8 Thunder damage and has the Deafened condition until the end of your next turn. On a successful save, the creature takes half as much damage only.

name: SEEKING SMOKE
description: When thrown at a creature that you can see within 30 feet of you, this shimmering liquid explodes, releasing a billowing cloud of smoke. The target must succeed on a DC 12 Dexterity saving throw or be coated in a cloak of smoke for 1 minute. For the duration, the target has Disadvantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks.

name: DANCING JUICE
description: You can coat one Melee weapon with this potion. For 1 hour, you can force a creature you hit with the coated weapon to make a DC 12 Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, the weapon is no longer coated in this potion, and the target begins to convulse in a manner that could be mistaken for an awkward, clumsy series of dance steps. Until the end of its next turn, the target’s Speed is reduced to 0, after which this effect ends.

name: PRICKLESKIN
description: Drinking this potion causes spines to emerge all over your body, which remain for 1 minute. These spines lay flat but can be controlled by you to stand on end. For the duration, whenever you successfully grapple a creature and as a Bonus Action on your subsequent turns while it remains Grappled by you, you can deal 1d4 Piercing damage to the target.

name: TINY BUBBLES
description: Drinking this pink, bitter-tasting potion causes hundreds of small, iridescent bubbles to emerge from your nose and mouth and fill a 20-foot Cube that you can see within 30 feet of you. If the bubbles are left untouched, they float in place, remaining there for 1 hour. When a creature enters a space occupied by the bubbles for the first time on a turn, it must make a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw. On a failed save, a cacophony of popping erupts as the bubbles burst, dealing 1d6 Thunder damage to each creature inside the Cube. The sound of the bubbles popping can be heard from a mile away.

name: CLAWS OF THE CRAB KING
description: Your hands turn into a handsome set of powerful crab claws for 1 minute. For the duration, when you use your Unarmed Strike to deal damage with the claws, they deal Slashing damage equal to 1d4 plus your Strength modifier instead of dealing the normal damage for your Unarmed Strike; these attacks deal double damage to objects and structures. In addition, you have a +2 bonus to your grapple’s escape DC using the claws. The claws can’t wield weapons or Shields or do anything that requires manual precision, such as using tools or magic items or performing the Somatic components of a spell.

name: RUBBERSKIN
description: When you drink this blue goo, your skin turns into a thick, gray rubber. For 1 hour, you have Resistance to Lightning damage.

name: KEENING VOICE
description: When you open this potion, a keening wail comes out of the bottle. Drinking this potion gives your vocal cords a magical resonance for 1 hour. For the duration, you can use a Bonus Action to make a ranged attack roll against a creature within 60 feet of you, using your Charisma (Performance) bonus for the attack bonus; the attack automatically misses if the target can’t hear you. On a hit, the target takes 1d6 Thunder damage.

name: KINETIC POP
description: When poured over a nonmagical weapon, this potion fills the mundane item with kinetic energy, causing it to vibrate with anticipation. The next time you hit a creature with the weapon, the energy explodes, doubling the damage rolled by the weapon’s damage dice. The effects of this potion last for 1 hour or until the energy explodes.

name: HEALING GAS
description: When thrown at a point you can see within 60 feet of you, this volatile liquid explodes, releasing a crimson ball of gas. Each creature within 5 feet of that point regains 1d4 + 1 Hit Points.

name: CINDERSKIN
description: When you drink this bubbling, black potion, your skin becomes encrusted with charcoal. For 1 hour, you have Resistance to Fire damage.

name: IRON MIND
description: After imbibing this elixir, your eyes glow with a silvery-blue hue. For 1 hour, you have Advantage on saving throws you make to avoid or end the Charmed condition, and you have Resistance to Psychic damage.

name: GARGOYLE HOOCH
description: This gray liquid tastes like mud and makes your tongue numb. Within seconds of swallowing the potion, your skin turns to living stone, giving you a +2 bonus to AC and reducing your Speed by 5 feet. The effects of this potion last for 1 hour, unless removed by a spell of level 5 or higher as if it were a curse.

name: ELIXIR OF JIPAMPA
description: When you drink this potion, you can feel your nervous system gain a boost of furtive energy from the rabbit spirit, Jipampa. Your pupils dilate and your reflexes become enhanced. For the next 24 hours, you gain a +5 bonus to Initiative rolls. Additionally, if a trigger would allow you to take a Reaction, but you have already taken your Reaction this round, you can choose to take a second Reaction; doing so causes the effects of this potion to end early.

name: CATSPEED
description: When you drink this potion, you are overwhelmed by a warm, lethargic sensation akin to a blanket pulled over an intense ball of energy you feel swirling inside of you. Once within the next 24 hours when you take the Attack action, you can make two additional attacks as part of that action. Once you do so, the effects of this potion end. While the potion is active, you gain the ability to purr like a cat.

name: DURABILITY
description: When you drink this potion, your skin becomes as tough as thick leather that, for a short time, repairs itself. For 1 minute, you gain 10 Temporary Hit Points at the start of each of your turns.

name: FIRE SHIELD
description: This potion burns like a hot tamale when you drink it and fills you with fiery strength. The next time you are subjected to Fire damage, you take no damage and instead regain a number of Hit Points equal to half the Fire damage dealt. The effects of this potion last for 24 hours or until you regain Hit Points in this way.

name: TUNNEL VISION
description: Drinking this potion causes you to hyperfixate on your strikes, but potentially opens you to counterattacks. For the next minute, the first time you hit a target with an attack roll using a weapon or an Unarmed Strike on each of your turns, the target takes an extra 1d12 damage of the same type. Until the potion’s effects end, you also take a −2 penalty to AC.

name: RATATAM’S GLOWSKIN ELIXIR
description: Upon drinking, your skin begins to shed Dim Light in a 10-foot Emanation originating from you. As a Bonus Action, you can choose to intensify this light—shedding Bright Light in a 10-foot Emanation and Dim Light for an additional 10 feet—or diminish the light again. You can take a Magic action to produce a blinding flare around you. Each creature that can see you (other than you) in a 30-foot Emanation originating from you must succeed on a DC 16 Constitution saving throw or have the Blinded condition for 1 minute. Effected creatures can repeat the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on a success. The effects of this potion last for 8 hours, until you use the flare, or is removed by a spell of level 5 or higher as if it were a curse.

name: DON’T HIT ME JUICE
description: When thrown at a creature you can see within 30 feet of you, this bright pink elixir breaks, covering the creature in juice. The target must succeed on a DC 16 Wisdom saving throw or have the Pacified condition for 1 minute. A Pacified creature can’t attack, cast a spell that affects an enemy, or deal damage to another creature. The target can repeat the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

name: INVULNERABILITY
description: When you open this potion, it bursts forth with a symphonic fanfare. Until the start of your next turn, you have Immunity to all damage. On your next turn, you can’t move or take actions, as a wave of lethargy sweeps over you.

name: BOTTLED BIND
description: When thrown at a creature you can see within 30 feet of you, this thick mudlike potion breaks, covering the creature in tacky glue. The target must succeed on a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw or have the Restrained condition for 1 minute or until it escapes. To escape, the target or a creature within 5 feet of it must take an action to make a DC 15 Strength (Athletics) check, freeing the Restrained creature on a success.

name: RESPIRATORY DISTRESS
description: This potion reacts instantly when exposed to air, rapidly expanding into a cloud of irritating gas. You can throw it at a point you can see within 60 feet of you, causing it to break open and release the cloud in a 15-foot-radius Sphere centered on that point. Each creature within the cloud when it appears must make a DC 15 Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, a creature spends its Reaction coughing and snorting, and it loses Concentration.

name: PUMPKIN PATCH GUARD
description: When consumed, this warming harvest beverage transforms your head into a jack-o’-lantern. From your newly formed eyes you cast a beam of glowing light for 1 minute, which causes creatures in a 15-foot Cone to be under the effects of the Faerie Fire* spell. At the start of each for the duration, you decide whether the Cone is active or inactive and which direction it faces.

name: SHEEP DRAGON BREW
description: One swig of this hearty potion will see you growing a thick coat of sheep dragon wool all around your body. Besides keeping you warm, it aids your survival and protects you from the cold. For the duration your AC increases by 1, and you gain resistance to cold damage. The effects of the potion last for 1 hour.

name: ENHANCED STATIC SHOCK
description: This potion makes you feel tingly as it charges you up with static electricity. Immediately after a creature touches you or hits you with a melee attack using a metal weapon in the next 24 hours, you can take a Reaction to send a charge of static electricity back at that creature, dealing 3d10 Lightning damage to it. Once you do so, the effects of this potion end.

name: ENHANCED LIGHTNING BREATH
description: After drinking this shimmering gold liquid, your voice gains a crackling quality and your breath sparks and sputters for 24 hours. For the duration, you can take a Bonus Action to exhale an arc of lightning at a creature you can see within 30 feet of you. The target must make a DC 16 Dexterity saving throw, taking 3d10 Lightning damage on a failed save or half as much damage on a successful one. Once you exhale this lightning, the effects of this potion end.

name: ENHANCED BOTTLED BOMB
description: When thrown at a point you can see within 60 feet of you, this volatile liquid explodes. Each creature within 15 feet of that point must make a DC 16 Dexterity saving throw, taking 3d8 Force damage on a failed save or half as much damage on a successful one.

name: WRATHFUL SPIRIT
description: When consumed, the essence of a long-dead spirit overwhelms you. You feel on edge and have an undertone of rage that boils below the surface. Roll 2d8 and record the total. For the next minute, whenever you cast a spell, you can cause one target that took damage from it to take extra Force damage equal to the recorded number.

name: RAPID WITHDRAWAL
description: When you drink this potion, motes of pink light erupt from your body and orbit around you for 1 minute. For the duration, whenever you take damage from an enemy, you can take a Reaction to teleport up to 15 feet to an unoccupied space you can see.

name: LIFE-STEAL
description: This dangerous and disliked potion transforms when used. As a Magic action, you can uncork the potion and point it toward a creature you can see within 10 feet of you. The target takes 3d6 Necrotic damage, and the potion transforms into a healing elixir. A creature that consumes this elixir regains a number of Hit Points equal to the Necrotic damage dealt.

name: DEMONSKIN
description: Uncorking this potion, you are immediately assaulted with a powerfully pungent, acrid odor. Once you drink it, your skin takes on a glowing burgundy hue and your eyes turn a sickly crimson for 1 minute. For the duration, you gain a +2 bonus to AC, and you have Resistance to Bludgeoning, Cold, Fire, Lightning, Piercing, and Slashing damage. Until the effects of this potion end, your creature type changes to Demon (Fiend).

name: WITHERED WILL
description: After drinking this light and dewy potion, you gain the ability to expel withering vapor. For the next minute, you can take a Bonus Action to exhale a cloud in a 60-foot Cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 17 Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, a creature’s Speed is halved, it can’t take Reactions, and it has Disadvantage on attack rolls until the start of your next turn. Once you exhale this cloud, roll a d6 at the start of each of your turns. You can’t exhale the cloud again until you roll a 4–6 on the die.

name: ASTOUNDING VIGOR
description: When you drink this hearty potion, you feel the strongest and healthiest you’ve ever felt. You gain a number of Temporary Hit Points equal to your Hit Point maximum.

name: MANY HANDS
description: When you drink this potion you can call upon an ancient and devious spirit known as Many Hands. When you do, a host of long, spindly, spectral arms reach out from your body. Each creature (other than you) who can see you when the hands first emerge must succeed on a DC 19 Wisdom saving throw or have the Frightened condition until the start of your next turn; your allies have Advantage on this save. Additionally, the arms lash out from you, clawing at creatures in a 20-foot Emanation originating from you. Make a single melee spell attack, using an attack bonus of +11, which targets each creature (other than you) in that area. On a hit, a target takes 10d6 Necrotic damage and can’t regain Hit Points until the start of your next turn. On a miss, the creature takes half as much damage only.

name: EPIC BOTTLED BOMB
description: When thrown at a point you can see within 60 feet of you, this volatile liquid explodes. Each creature within 30 feet of that point must make a DC 19 Dexterity saving throw, taking 20d6 Force damage on a failed save or half as much damage on a successful one.

name: ESSENCE OF GREAT RIVERS
description: This crystal clear potion captures the essence of the four great river spirits Mu, Go, Yon, and Din. Consuming it allows you to call on their strength to aid you. Whenever you fail a saving throw, you can choose to succeed instead. The effects of this potion last for 24 hours or until you have changed a failed save into a successful one three times.

name: CARLA CACKLETOOTH’S CORRUPTION COCKTAIL
description: This potion was invented by none other than the legendary Carla Cackletooth, a witch of considerable potion-making prowess. When poured out, it summons 10 Corrupted Muks in the nearest unoccupied spaces, which are at your beck and call and under your control until destroyed.

name: HUNTER’S SPEED
description: When this amber potion is consumed, you gain the attributes of the Hunter, one of the great beasts of Obojima. Roll a d4. For the next minute, you gain a Fly Speed of 90 feet, and whenever you take the Attack action, you can make an additional number of attacks equal to 1 plus the number rolled on the d4.

name: HERO’S BLADE
description: When poured over a weapon, this heroic elixir stains it blue and causes it to shimmer as if it were a gemstone reflecting light. For the next minute, the weapon gains a +3 bonus to attack rolls and damage rolls. Until this effect ends, creatures hit by the weapon don’t benefit from any Damage Immunities or Resistances they have for 1 minute.

name: SEVERED REACTION
description: Consuming this foggy brew gives you a headache you can never quite alleviate. While under the effects of this potion, you can take two Reactions each round instead of one. Each time you take a second Reaction, you lose a number of Hit Points equal to half your level (round down). The effects of this potion are Permanent.

name: DRAGON FROG TRANSMUTATION
description: After guzzling down this froggy potion, you turn into an Elder Dragon Frog, as if by the True Polymorph* spell. This transformation lasts for 1 minute, or 10 minutes if a Dragon Fang of Yutro was used when brewing this potion.

name: SENSORIUS MAXIMUS
description: This effervescent green potion tastes like an old sock. When imbibed, it heightens all the senses with an expansive, almost euphoric feeling. For the next hour, you gain a +3 bonus to Wisdom (Perception) checks.

name: FLIP & SKIP
description: This blue potion sparkles and fizzes when opened and makes your tongue tingle when imbibed. For the next hour, you gain a +3 bonus to Dexterity (Acrobatics) checks.

name: BRUTE BREW
description: Drinking this brownish broth fills your sinews with ogreish power. For the next hour, you gain a +3 bonus to Strength (Athletics) checks.

name: ANIMAL AFFINITY
description: This potion has a violet color and smells like a spring meadow. When you drink it, you become very calm and are able to sense subtle cues from all kinds of animals. For the next hour, you gain a +3 bonus to Wisdom (Animal Handling) checks.

name: DETECTIVE’S TONIC
description: This subtle, bourbon-flavored potion burns when consumed. For the next hour, you gain a +3 bonus to Intelligence (Investigation) checks.

name: CAVE DIVER
description: When this potion is poured on your hands and feet, they temporarily become stained with a deep indigo color. For the next 10 minutes, you gain the ability to move up, down, and across vertical surfaces and along ceilings, while leaving your hands free. You also gain a Climb Speed equal to your Speed.

name: PERFECT MEMORY
description: For 1 hour after drinking this potion, everything you see and hear is recorded perfectly in your memory. You can recall these memories up to 24 hours later. After that, all the memories begin to fade with only the most memorable parts remaining.

name: EYES OF AKIBU
description: When this potion is poured over your eyes, your long-range vision enhances. For 4 hours, you can see up to 300 feet away as if looking at something one-tenth as far away from you.

name: GLOWSKIN
description: Ironically, glowskin potions are jet black in color until shaken. After drinking this potion, your skin sheds Bright Light in a 30-foot Emanation and Dim Light for an additional 30 feet. The effects of this potion last for 4 hours, unless removed as if it were a curse.

name: TINY TELEKINESIS
description: When you drink this potion, you feel a slight pressure behind your eyes as though something is pushing on the inside of your skull trying to get out. For the next minute, you gain the ability to move inanimate objects with your mind. As a Magic action, you can choose an inanimate object you can see within 60 feet of you that isn’t being worn or carried and move it up to 30 feet in any direction. The object can be no larger than 5 inches in diameter, and it can’t weigh more than 1 pound. You can’t move the object more than 60 feet away from you in this way.

name: IRRESISTIBLE CHARM
description: Once imbibed, a tingling sensation builds within you, bubbling up into a giddy euphoria of confident charm. For the next 10 minutes, you gain Expertise in the Persuasion skill.

name: PATHSEEKING
description: This potion is brewed for the specific task of detecting tracks left by a Secret Path potion. For 1 hour after drinking it, such tracks appear to you as glowing footprints made with uncanny detail. You can also see into the Spirit Realm (Ethereal Plane) for the duration.

name: IRON BELLY
description: Legend has it that Obojiman rangers would use this potion during long treks in the wilderness so they could eat unknown roots and fungi, as well as drink from lakes and lowland streams, without fear of illness. When imbibed, you gain 5 Temporary Hit Points, and you have Resistance to Poison damage for 1 hour.

name: FACE OF FUGARI
description: Fugari is a figure of legend, a dragon frog who would glower at his subjects, filling them with dread at being swallowed whole. Drinking this potion gives you a grim, bull-froggish demeanor which strikes fear into those who view you. For the next minute, you have Advantage on Charisma (Intimidation) checks.

name: DUCK FOOT
description: When you drink this brackish-smelling potion, your hands and feet begin to tingle. Within seconds, they turn a bright orange and become webbed like a mallard’s feet. For the next hour, you gain a Swim Speed of 40 feet and are able to make a very convincing quacking sound.

name: POTION OF FOG
description: When you drink this potion, a billow of thick fog pours from your mouth, which fills a 20-foot Emanation originating from you. The fog’s area is Heavily Obscured. It lasts for 1 hour or until a strong wind (such as one created by Gust of Wind*) disperses it. As a Magic action, you can expel all remaining fog from your stomach, causing it to remain centered on that space for the duration. The fog produces a scent of your choice.

name: SECRET PATH
description: When this potion is applied to a pair of boots, it allows their wearer to leave a trail of magical tracks that are invisible to the naked eye. When brewed, the creator of this potion chooses the color of the tracks. This trail is only visible to a creature that can see invisible objects (such as one benefiting from See Invisibility* or Truesight*) or one that is under the effects of a Pathseeking potion. The boots can leave tracks in this way for the next 24 hours, and the tracks last for 30 days before vanishing.

name: GRANDMA’S TURNIP SOUP
description: This potion tastes like a soup made with love. When you consume it during a Short Rest, you can roll 1d4 Hit Dice (adding your Constitution modifier to each and regaining Hit Points equal to the total) without expending them.

name: HERBALIST’S AID
description: Drinking this highly sought-after potion grants you a unique sense helpful for detecting ingredients. For the next hour, you gain a +3 bonus to all ability checks made to locate an ingredient.

name: HOMEWARD TONIC
description: This fiery red elixir smells of home and drinking it gives a sensation of comfort when consumed. For the next 24 hours, you always know the direction of the place you consider home, provided it is on the same plane of existence.

name: SOFT PAW
description: When consumed, this liquorice-flavored potion turns your hands and feet into fur-covered paws. For the next 10 minutes, you have Advantage on Dexterity checks.

name: POTION OF HEALING TOUCH
description: When this glowing blue potion is poured on your hands, it gives you the ability to heal. As a Bonus Action, you can touch a creature, causing it to regain 2d4 Hit Points. The effects of this potion last for 1 hour or until you heal a creature in this way.

name: CAT’S EYE
description: When you imbibe this potion, your eyes become catlike, and you can choose their color. For the next hour, you have Darkvision* with a range of 60 feet. If you already have Darkvision from another source, its range increases by 30 feet.

name: LIQUID MENDING
description: Also known as “craftsman in a bottle,” this well-loved potion is found in most homes and shops. You can pour this potion over an object to repair a single break or tear in it, as if by the Mending* cantrip.

name: LIQUID LOCKPICK
description: Although frowned upon in many villages, this useful potion is still sought after by many islanders for both wholesome and nefarious reasons. You can pour the potion into a lock, loosening the mechanism inside and decreasing the DC to pick it by 1d4 for the next hour. While a lock’s DC is reduced by this potion, its DC can’t be reduced again by another Liquid Lockpick potion.

name: LANGUAGE LORE
description: This grayish potion tastes like chewed up paper. For 1 hour after drinking it, you understand the literal meaning of any language that you hear or see signed.

name: PIG SNOUT
description: After drinking this pink pastel potion, you experience an uncomfortable but brief transformation, growing a beautiful, snuffling pig snout. For the next hour, you become very fond of truffles, perhaps even to the point of belligerence, and you have Advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on smell.

name: MACHINE OIL
description: When poured over a machine that is in working condition, this dark black liquid powers up the device, allowing it to function as if it were whelmed by a spirit or activated by the Jolt* cantrip. The machine stays powered by this potion for 1 minute.

name: POTION OF SOFT STEPS
description: When you drink this frothy brew, you float an inch off the ground and walk on a cushion of air. For the next 10 minutes, you gain a +2 bonus to Dexterity (Stealth) checks, and you leave no discernible tracks.

name: LIQUID CAT
description: This lively, swirling concoction transforms and solidifies into a friendly cat when poured out. The cat serves you as a familiar, as if from the Find Familiar* spell. The cat disappears after 24 hours.

name: TWIN VISION
description: This potion must be shared with another creature, each of them ingesting half of the potion. When the second half of the potion is consumed, the creature that consumed the first half gains the ability to see through the eyes of the second creature for the next 8 hours. While under this effect, it gains the benefits of any special senses the second creature has. This benefit can’t be used if the creatures are more than 1 mile apart. While seeing in this way, the first creature is blind with regard to its own senses. Either creature can use its action to stop the shared vision or reactivate it.

name: SPIRIT REPELLENT
description: This potion causes the nearby area to become repulsive to spirits. The source of the potion’s effect is either you (if you imbibe it) or a 1-foot Square within your reach (if you pour it out), and its effect lasts for 1 minute. When you use this potion, any Spirit within 30 feet of the source must make a DC 15 Charisma saving throw; a Spirit has Advantage on this save if it has a Challenge Rating of 6 or higher. On a failed save, the spirit is teleported to a random unoccupied space that is at least 35 feet away from the source (but not through Total Cover), and it can’t willingly move to a space within 30 feet of the source until the effect of this potion ends. A spirit that hasn’t made this save must immediately do so if it moves to a space within 30 feet of the source before the effect ends, being subjected to the effect on a failed save.

name: ESSENCE OF THE RIVER SPIRIT
description: This small, stoppered vial contains a clear liquid that shimmers with a faint blue light. When the vial is opened, you can pour the liquid into a small pool of water (such as a bath or hot spring), transforming it into a healing pool. A creature that soaks in the pool for at least 10 minutes regains 4d4 + 4 Hit Points. The pool loses its magic after 1 hour or once six creatures have benefited from this effect.

name: POTION OF FREEZING
description: Pouring this grayish-blue potion into any liquid will cause that liquid to freeze solid for 1 hour, after which it begins to thaw as normal. This effect can freeze no more than a 20-foot Cube of liquid.

name: POTION OF ATTUNEMENT
description: As a Magic action, you can pour a drop of this potion onto a magic item that requires attunement and drink the rest. Once you do so, you instantly become attuned to that item.

name: WATER BREATHING
description: This tropical fruity elixir tastes just as delicious as your favorite juice. For 1 hour after drinking it, you can breathe underwater.

name: LIQUID DISPEL
description: When thrown at a creature, object, or magical effect within 30 feet of you, this potion breaks, releasing its contents on the target. Any ongoing spell of level 3 or lower on the target immediately ends.

name: POCKET STOMACH
description: When imbibed, your stomach temporarily functions as a Bag of Holding*, allowing you to store any object you can fit in your mouth inside its extradimensional space. The effects of this potion last for 1 hour, after which you throw up anything consumed.

name: LIQUID ARCANA
description: When brewed, the creator of this potion rolls a d4 to determine the maximum level of the spell slot it can restore. When you drink it, you immediately regain your highest-level expended spell slot of the rolled level or lower.

name: ARCANE SOLVENT
description: When this potion is applied to a magic item, any creature that was attuned to it is no longer attuned. If the item is being worn or carried by the attuned creature, that creature can resist the effects of this potion with a successful DC 13 Charisma saving throw.

name: GARDENER’S SOLUTION
description: When this oily, greenish potion is rubbed on a plant, the plant instantly grows to full maturity. If the plant is too big for the space—such as a redwood tree—it will stop growing once it has reasonably filled the space. If you imbibe the potion, it has no effect, but it tastes like maple syrup.

name: POTION OF EXERTION
description: When you drink this potion, you gain a surge of manic energy. You can take another action this round at Initiative count 0.

name: BREAKFAST IN A BOTTLE
description: When brewed, the creator of this potion rolls a d4 to determine the number of servings it creates. When it’s poured out, this liquid quickly forms into an appetizing breakfast, such as some bread or pancakes. A creature that consumes one serving of it feels satiated for the day, and its Exhaustion level decreases by 1. It takes 1 minute to consume one serving, and once a creature benefits from this effect, it can’t do so again until it finishes a Long Rest. The food spoils after 24 hours, losing its magic.

name: TWIN TELEPATHY
description: This potion must be shared with another creature, each of them ingesting half of the potion. Once the second half of the potion is consumed, the imbibers can communicate telepathically across any distance, including between different planes of existence, for the next 24 hours.

name: POTION OF REPRIEVE
description: When imbibed, this potion offers temporary relief from an ill effect, allowing you to gain one benefit of your choice from the Greater Restoration* spell. After 1 hour, you lose the chosen benefit, causing the ill effect to return.

name: UNCANNY FOCUS
description: This purplish liquid smells of ammonia. For 1 minute after drinking it, you have Advantage on Constitution saving throws made to maintain Concentration, and your Concentration doesn’t end as a result of having the Incapacitated condition.

name: MEDITATIVE TRANCE
description: This violet-colored potion smells like lavender and citrus. The next time you take a Short Rest after ingesting it, you enjoy a deep, dreamless sleep. When you finish the rest, you gain the benefits of a Long Rest, even if you already benefited from a Long Rest in the past 24 hours.

name: POTION OF HOLISTIC WELLNESS
description: When you uncork this potion of scintillating liquid, your senses are calmed with the smell of vanilla and honey along with a warm spring breeze. When imbibed, you regain 4d8 + 4 Hit Points, and the following conditions on you end: Blinded, Charmed, Deafened, Exhaustion, Frightened, Incapacitated, Paralyzed, Petrified, Poisoned, Stunned, Unconscious.

name: SHARP MIND
description: When you drink this potion, your mind becomes charged with magical energy. For the next 8 hours, you gain a +2 bonus to Intelligence saving throws, and you have Resistance to Psychic damage. In addition, you can devour whole tomes of text, reading 10 times faster than normal.

name: MIND OVER MIGHT
description: When consumed, this chalky elixir turns an intellectual scholar into an athlete. For the next 24 hours, you can use your Intelligence or Wisdom modifier (your choice), instead of your Strength or Dexterity modifier, when making Strength (Athletics) and Dexterity (Acrobatics) checks. You also gain proficiency in the Acrobatics and Athletics skills for the duration, if you don’t already have it.

name: SIMULACRUM ELIXIR
description: When consumed, this numbing concoction lulls you into a deep sleep. By the time you wake up, your mind has taken over a perfect clone of yourself, which appears in a random location within 10 feet of you. The clone appears to be the same as you in every way, but it is formed without any equipment other than mundane clothes. The clone uses your game statistics at the time you consumed this potion, except it is a Construct, its Hit Point maximum is half as much, and it can’t cast the Simulacrum* spell or be affected by another Simulacrum Elixir. The clone can’t gain levels, and it can’t take Short or Long Rests. While the clone exists, your original body is in a state of suspended animation; it has the Unconscious condition (even if you would normally have Immunity to that condition), doesn't age, and doesn't need food, water, or air. The clone lasts until you dismiss it (no action required) or it drops to 0 Hit Points, at which point it disappears in a cloud of butterflies. When it disappears, your mind returns to your original body.

name: HIDDEN HAND
description: When consumed, this grainy potion heightens your senses and gives you a feeling of untapped strength. For the next 24 hours, you gain telekinetic powers as if you were under the effects of the Telekinesis* spell.

name: LAST RESORT
description: When this potion is downed, a crystalline cocoon begins forming around you. The cocoon becomes fully formed at the start of your next turn, and you can’t be communicated or interacted with in any way while inside it. The cocoon has Immunity to all damage, and it can’t be moved or destroyed by any means short of a Wish* spell. While in the cocoon, you are in a state of suspended animation; you have the Unconscious condition (even if you would normally have Immunity to that condition), don’t age, and don’t need food, water, or air. The cocoon lasts between 1 hour and 4 decades. Roll on the table below to determine the measurement of time for the effect, from hours to decades. Then roll a d4 to determine the exact amount of time the cocoon exists.

name: ELIXIR OF ECHOES
description: When you drink this potion, you gain the ability to cast a spell of your choice that was recently cast by another creature near you. The spell has to have been cast within 100 feet of you, and you must be aware that it was cast. You can cast the copied spell once within the next minute without expending a spell slot or needing Material components. If the spell requires a saving throw or an attack roll, it uses the save DC and attack bonus of the creature that originally cast the spell.

name: BLESSING OF THE MOON SPIRIT
description: After drinking this potion, which glows like a full moon, you gain a strange and wondrous affinity for lunar light. Your Hit Point maximum increases by 2d10. In addition, while in moonlight, you can take a Bonus Action to spend up to three Hit Dice, regaining Hit Points as if you finished a Short Rest. Once you spend Hit Dice in this way, you can’t do so again until you finish a Long Rest. The effects of this potion are Permanent.

name: BOWARK’S BOMBASTIC BEER
description: This potion was discovered by accident by the great brewmaster, Bowark. Unsealing it fills the room with a strong scent of hops and yeasty goodness. When consumed, this beer gives you a warm, euphoric calm that makes you feel like everything will be alright. Until this potion’s effects end, you can choose to reroll any D20 Test you make. Once you have rerolled a D20 Test in this way 7 times, the effects of this potion end.

name: UNIFIED MIGHT
description: When consumed, this potion produces a burning sensation that fills your body, leaving you with newfound intellectual and physical strength. For the next hour, two ability scores of your choice increase to 25.

name: UMI’S POWERFUL UNDERTOW
description: This potent elixir allows the drinker to enhance their aquatic spells with the ocean’s wrath. For the next hour, when you cast a spell that produces or manipulates water in some way, the spell is cast as if using a spell slot of one level higher. Additionally, spells that use water to deal damage to a creature or an object deal an extra 2d12 Bludgeoning damage. Instead of drinking the potion, you can throw it into an unoccupied space within 30 feet of you, breaking the glass and summoning three Water Elementals* in the nearest unoccupied spaces. These creatures are under your control until destroyed.

name: ISLAND NECTAR
description: Consuming this sweet potion gives you a calming sensation before reinvigorating your life force and pushing you into action. You immediately regain 100 Hit Points. As part of the same Bonus Action to consume this potion, you can also make a melee attack with a weapon or an Unarmed Strike, cast a spell with a casting time of an action that targets only one creature or object, or move up to your Speed.

name: ELIXIR OF OMNIMIND
description: This pale blue potion smells like ozone. When you drink it, your mind expands, and you gain a brief but exceptional capacity to comprehend the vast complexities of the arcane. For the next minute, you can concentrate on two spells or other effects at the same time. If you are forced to make a Constitution saving throw to maintain Concentration, you must make a separate saving throw for each spell or effect.

name: MELODIOUS BIRD CALLS
description: When you drink this frothy liquid, you can perfectly mimic the call of any songbird for 24 hours.

name: PROJECTED THOUGHTS
description: When you drink this gritty potion, a 1-foot-diameter bubble emerges from the top of your head. The bubble lasts for 1 hour and moves with you, remaining centered on you. Until this effect ends, you can choose to project your thoughts into the bubble where they manifest as illusory but silent words or images (your choice), which anyone can see.

name: INTOXICATING AROMA
description: When consumed, you smell of an expertly crafted perfume. The effects of this potion last for 22 years, unless removed as if it were a curse. Drinking another potion doesn’t negate this potion’s effects, and this potion doesn’t count toward the number of potions you have consumed for the purpose of Potion Sickness.

name: LADYBUG KINSHIP
description: When opened, this potion quickly evaporates over the course of 1 minute. While evaporating, ladybugs fly out of the bottle at a rate of 500 per round.

name: ESSENCE OF UMAMI
description: This potion makes everything taste amazing. When you pour it on any food, no matter if it’s a hunk of tofu or a slab of slow-roasted brisket, Essence of Umami makes it glow with magic. When the food is tasted, it gives the taster their own personal version of the ultimate culinary experience.

name: VOCAL STRANGER
description: Once imbibed, you can perfectly mimic the speech of a person you’re not familiar with for the next hour. If you can’t think of a person you’ve never met, you instead mimic a random voice.

name: BEARD BREW
description: Drinking this fuzzy liquid gives the sensation of wool rubbing against your entire body. When consumed, you instantly grow facial hair, even if you would not normally be able to do so. The style of facial hair is random, and it stays on your face until shaven off. Drinking another potion doesn’t negate this potion’s effects, and this potion doesn’t count toward the number of potions you have consumed for the purpose of Potion Sickness.

name: PHOTOSYNTHETIC SKIN
description: This vibrant green potion tastes like freshly cut grass. For the next 24 hours, you regain 1 hit point at the start of every hour that you spend in sunlight.

name: PARADISE PLUMAGE
description: After drinking this potion, you are adorned with striking and distinctive plumage. You can control the plumage to create dazzling displays of shimmering feathers, iridescent colors, and stunning patterns. While doing so, you have Advantage on Charisma (Performance) checks made to distract or amaze. The effects of this potion last for 24 hours, unless removed as if it were a curse.

name: MUSICAL MIXER
description: When opened, this silvery elixir evaporates over the course of 1 hour. While evaporating, it produces beautiful, ethereal music.

name: STINK BREW
description: After drinking this potion, you stink for 1d4 rounds. Until this effect ends, any creature (other than you) that starts its turn in a 15-foot Emanation originating from you must succeed on a DC 13 Constitution saving throw or be unable to willingly move closer to you for the duration. A creature that succeeds on this save is immune to the effect for the duration.

name: DUKO THE TRICKSTER’S ELIXIR
description: This potion is easily mistaken for brackish water. At any point after drinking it, you can produce one of the following objects from your mouth (no action required): a coin, an egg, a rock, or a 2-foot-long string. The effects of this potion end after you produce an object in this way. Drinking another potion doesn’t negate this potion’s effects, and this potion doesn’t count toward the number of potions you have consumed for the purpose of Potion Sickness.

name: MANIFESTED NOSTALGIA
description: After consuming this clear and flavorless potion, you quickly undergo a radical transformation, becoming the child version of yourself. While transformed, you are one size smaller (to a minimum of Small), and your Strength and Dexterity scores are 10 unless those scores were already lower. The effects of this potion last for 4 hours, unless removed as if it were a curse.

name: PIGMENT
description: When consumed, this multicolored potion allows you to produce a variety of oil paints from the tips of your fingers for the next 8 hours. For the duration, you can change the color of the paints at will, and they never seem to run out.

name: AUDIO ODDITY
description: When opened, this embarrassing and noisy potion sounds like a man sobbing. For 1 hour after consuming it, the sounds produced by any spell you cast are muted.

name: HINDSIGHT
description: A well-known potion among investigators and merchants, this thick brew acquires special insight on an object when poured over it. The only downside is that you must then lick the brew off the object to obtain any of this information. When poured and then licked off, you learn a minor but useful bit of information about the object.

name: SUPER SINGING
description: When consumed, this potion tastes as if it were a freshly brewed tea with the perfect amount of honey mixed in. You are unable to speak without singing, and you have Advantage on Charisma (Performance) checks using your voice. The effects of this potion last for 1 hour, unless removed as if it were a curse.

name: FLUFFPLUM TONIC
description: This nearly weightless liquid grants to drinkers the attributes of a dandelion, allowing them to float safely to the ground when falling and be easily carried by the wind. For the next hour, you are under the effects of the Feather Fall* spell and weigh no more than 1 pound.

name: MERRIMENT
description: Is this just booze? After drinking this potion, you become incredibly intoxicated and gain Expertise in a skill of your choice. You also have Disadvantage on all ability checks you make that don’t use the chosen skill. The effects of this potion last for 1 hour, unless removed as if it were a curse.

name: BUBBLE MESSAGE
description: As part of the Bonus Action to consume this potion, you speak a message and hiccup a bubble, which magically contains your message inside it. You then describe a creature you are familiar with and the bubble floats to that creature, traveling at a speed of 1 mile per hour, and then pops. The bubble pops early if it takes any damage. When the bubble pops, it releases the contained message in your voice.

name: CRYSTAL CLEAR
description: This aqua-blue potion feels cold to the touch and raises the hairs on your arm when opened. When poured into a nonmagical liquid, that liquid is Invisible for 1d4 hours. If the liquid the potion is poured into is larger than a 20-foot Cube, this magic has no effect.

name: ELDER ELIXIR
description: This unassuming potion temporarily doubles your age when consumed. The effects of this potion last for 1d12 months. Drinking another potion doesn’t negate this potion’s effects, and this potion doesn’t count toward the number of potions you have consumed for the purpose of Potion Sickness.

name: WITCH’S HIDDEN GEM
description: This bland and underwhelming-looking potion coats your mouth and gullet as you drink it, leaving a thin film. For the next hour, all liquid you consume turns into wine as you drink it.

name: CARBONATED SNAKE
description: When shaken and pointed in a direction, the contents of this zippy elixir shoot out of the bottle, turning into a Venomous Snake* midair and landing in a space within 10 feet of you.

name: SHADOW CHILD
description: Upon drinking this potion, you are filled with intense feelings of confusion before an apparition emerges from your body. The apparition resembles a young girl with onyx skin, black hair, and piercing green eyes. Only you can see the apparition, and it can’t speak. It functions as the Unseen Servant* spell and lasts for 1 hour.

name: HSIREBBIG
description: Drinking this bitter potion grants you a special form of nonsensical speech you can use for the next 24 hours. This speech sounds like absolute gibberish to anyone who isn’t also under the effects of a Hsirebbig potion. Even magic like the Comprehend Languages* spell fails to decipher this speech.

name: SKY SWIMMING
description: After drinking this potion, you feel the sudden and unpleasant feeling of wearing soaking-wet clothing. For the next 10 minutes, you gain a Fly Speed of 15 feet and can hover, but it looks and feels as if you’re swimming through the sky. While flying in this way, you are subjected to the rules for Underwater Combat.

name: PASSING MEMORY
description: When this powerful elixir is brewed, the creator chooses one of its memories, imbuing it within this powerful elixir. When consumed, you gain the stored memory.

name: BOTTLED SLIME
description: This mischievous little slime can sometimes form in place of a potion. If noticed before being consumed, you can throw the bottle to an unoccupied space within 30 feet of you, releasing a Soda Slime in the space where it shatters.

name: OIL OF THE TRADEMARK FLOURISH
description: When you apply this oil to an object, you assign a signature sound that accompanies the object when it’s used. The effects of this potion are Permanent, unless removed as if it were a curse.

name: MOSSPOT
description: After drinking this earthy mixture, your form quickly shifts and shrinks. You immediately transform into a Mossling, as if by the Polymorph* spell. This effect doesn’t require Concentration and lasts for 1 hour or until you dismiss it (no action required).

name: INCREDIBLE LUCK
description: After drinking this wonderful liquid, your spirits lift and optimistic feelings pour over you. You have Advantage on the next 1d4 D20 Tests you make.

name: GRAND FRIENDSHIP
description: This golden elixir can be divided evenly among up to eight creatures. When consumed, the creatures that partook gain a conditional ability to fly. For the next 24 hours, those creatures gain a Fly Speed of 60 feet, but only while all the creatures that partook are holding hands.

name: WITCH’S LAMENT
description: When thrown at a creature you can see within 60 feet of you, the target must make a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw. On a failed save, a rain cloud appears over the target. Then in a flash of lightning, its head takes on the form of an anthropomorphic animal chosen by the GM. The effects of this potion last for 24 hours, unless removed by a spell of level 5 or higher as if it were a curse.

name: SPIRIT APPENDAGE
description: This bitter, unappealing elixir turns your stomach and is often a fight to keep down your gullet. Once consumed, you grow a 6-foot-long prehensile tail, which takes a form decided by the GM. The tail can be used as if it were a third arm and can easily support your own weight. The tail lasts for 1d12 days before falling off. Drinking another potion doesn’t negate this potion’s effects, and this potion doesn’t count toward the number of potions you have consumed for the purpose of Potion Sickness.

name: MOVE-A-THING
description: When this potion is poured over an object that weighs 500 pounds or less, the object begins to get lighter and lighter. The object’s weight decreases by 1d100 pounds at the start of every hour, to a minimum weight of 10 pounds. Its weight remains at 10 pounds for 7 days, after which the effects of this potion end.

name: GOBBLE GUNK
description: This unappealing potion allows you to eat whatever you can fit in your mouth with no ill effects—metal, poison, seawater: you name it, you can eat it. The effects of this potion last 1 hour. Any magical objects consumed in this way are hurled back up when this effect ends.

name: POCKET PORTAL
description: When this potion is buried and left to sit for 24 hours, its contents sprout and form a temporary portal to the Spirit Realm from knotted roots and mud. The portal stays open for 24 hours before closing.

name: DON’T EAT DIRT
description: When consumed, this viscous brew tastes like wet soil. For the next 10 days, you have Immunity to the Prone condition. Whenever you would have the Prone condition, even if you attempt to give it to yourself, you instead remain upright as if an imperceptible force kept you that way.

name: LUNAR ELIXIR
description: When poured out, this silvery liquid rapidly expands and coats the surrounding area, creating a chalky white sheen across everything it touches. For the next 8 hours, gravity in a 20-foot-radius, 300-foot-high Cylinder centered on the point where the potion was poured is like the moon’s gravity. The jump distance for all creatures inside the Cylinder is tripled, and damage from falling inside the Cylinder is halved.

name: LIFETIME SUPPLY
description: When consumed, this potion causes your hair to grow at an accelerated rate. Roll 1d4 + 2 and multiply the result by 100 to determine how many feet of hair you grow. After 1 minute, the potion wears off and all your hair falls out.

name: INVISIBLE TONIC
description: Once poured over an object that is Small or smaller, the object has the Invisible condition. The effects of this potion are Permanent, unless removed by a spell of level 5 or higher as if it were a curse.

name: LIQUID DISGUISE
description: When brewed, this potion takes on the essence of a random Humanoid within 1 mile. When consumed, you take on the visage of that Humanoid. The effects of this potion last for 24 hours, unless removed as if it were a curse.

name: SPIRIT SWEETS
description: This bitter concoction tastes and smells horrible to physical beings, yet couldn’t taste more delicious to Spirits, many of which would trade quite a bit for a sip of the brew. A Spirit with a Challenge Rating of 8 or lower that consumes this potion becomes drunk and happy for 1d4 days. Alternatively, you can pour the potion out to attract nearby Spirits. When used in this way, Spirits within 1 mile of the potion that have a Challenge Rating of 2 or lower are attracted to it for the next 8 hours or until the potion is consumed or otherwise destroyed.

name: A NEW LOOK
description: When imbibed, this unassuming elixir transforms your head into a random anthropomorphic animal, such as a horse, panda, pig, or raccoon. The effects of this potion are Permanent, unless removed by a spell of level 5 or higher as if it were a curse.

name: SHADOW PUPPET
description: Once consumed, this potion gives sentience to your shadow. The shadow starts to act independently of you but is still bound to your body. It has its own emotions and personality, but can’t interact with the world in any way beyond what a normal shadow could. The effects of this potion are Permanent, unless removed by a spell of level 5 or higher as if it were a curse.

name: OBJECT EMBODIMENT
description: When you drink this metallic potion, your body twists and transforms into an object of your choice, as if by the True Polymorph* spell. This effect doesn't require Concentration and lasts for 1 hour.

name: PHOENIX ELIXIR
description: When imbibed, this elixir burns your throat and ignites an ember within you. For 24 hours, you have Immunity to Fire damage. When the potion’s magic finally fades, the fire inside you burns intensely from within, consuming you in flames and turning your body to ash. After 1 hour, you appear in the nearest bonfire, born anew. All equipment you were wearing or carrying when you turned to ash is left by your original body.

name: UNKNOWN ELIXIR
description: This bizarre blend of flavors reminds you of freshly cut grass, petroleum jelly, and honey. When consumed, it sits in your stomach like a rock and slowly swells in power. You gain the ability to cast one random spell of level 6 or lower without expending a spell slot. This spell uses a spell save DC of 17 and a spell attack bonus of +9. The effects of this potion last until the spell is cast. Drinking another potion doesn’t negate this potion’s effects, and this potion doesn’t count toward the number of potions you have consumed for the purpose of Potion Sickness.

name: ILLUSION IN A BOTTLE
description: When poured out, an illusion of your choice appears in the potion’s space, as if by the Major Image* spell (save DC 18). The illusion lasts for 1 hour.

name: HOMEGROWN
description: When poured over a surface that is at least a 50-foot square and isn’t obstructed by obstacles (such as trees or boulders), this pungent liquid begins to quickly foam and expand. After 1 minute, a newly formed and fully furnished home of grand size appears in the space.

name: MIND TRANSFER
description: When imbibed, this acrid elixir loosens your soul from your body and prepares it for transfer. The first time you are touched by a creature after consuming this potion, your mind and soul transfer into that creature’s body. While inhabiting the target’s body, you can force it to make an Intelligence or Wisdom check against your Intelligence or Wisdom check (you both choose which ability to use) at the start of each of the target’s turns. If you succeed, you gain total control over the target until the start of its next turn. While your mind and soul are away, your body is left behind in a state of suspended animation; it has the Unconscious condition (even if you would normally have Immunity to that condition), doesn’t age, and doesn't need food, water, or air. If the target dies while your mind and soul are still inside it, you also die. You inhabit the target’s body for 1 hour, until you dismiss the effect as a Magic action, or until the target is subjected to an effect that ends possession (such as the Dispel Evil and Good* spell).

name: NEW LIFE
description: When this potion is brewed, the creator chooses the likeness of a Humanoid it is familiar with. When imbibed, you take on the illusionary form of the chosen creature. This illusory disguise is perfect in every way and matches both the creature’s appearance and its voice. This disguise can only be discerned by a creature with the ability to detect magic or see through illusions (as with Truesight). The effects of this potion last for 7 years, unless removed by a spell of level 7 or higher as if it were a curse. Drinking another potion doesn’t negate this potion’s effects, and this potion doesn’t count toward the number of potions you have consumed for the purpose of Potion Sickness.

name: UPS-A-DAISY
description: When poured over a creature or object, this creamy elixir instantly awakens the target, as if by the Awaken* spell. The awakened target has the Charmed condition for 1 year instead of 30 days.

name: SPIRITUAL REBUKE
description: When poured, this dark elixir stains the earth and creates a 10-foot Cube that is void of the island’s magic, as if it were under the effects of the Antimagic Field* spell. This effect lasts for 1 year.

name: NEWLY FOUND MAGIC
description: When consumed, you feel a rush of magical inspiration flow through you, granting you access to a random level 3 spell, which you always have prepared. You can cast it without expending a spell slot, and once you do so, you can’t cast it in this way again until you finish a Long Rest. The effects of this potion are Permanent.

name: CRAFTER’S BREW
description: When poured into a container of water or a small body of water, this potion creates an enchanting bath. The first nonmagical object submerged in the water for at least 1 minute permanently becomes a magic item. It gains a random magical property that is powerful enough for the item’s rarity to be Uncommon or higher.

name: DANCING FEET
description: After drinking this potion, you no longer walk or run—now you dance. Going from one place to another is no longer a mundane trudge, a shuffling expression of ennui. How you get from point A to point B is now a dazzling performance. From smooth, elven waltzes to nakudama hops and gyrations to the interpretive dance forms of the dara, you explore them all. Your stylish moves increase your Speed by 10 feet, give you a +5 bonus to Charisma (Performance) checks that involve dancing, and grant you proficiency in Dexterity saving throws if you don’t already have it. The effects of this potion last until you dismiss them as a Magic action.

name: CHICKEN CHASER
description: When you drink this potion, your hair turns dark red (if you have any), and you gain the ability to speak with chickens, as if by the Speak with Animals* spell. Additionally, you can crow a sacred and thunderous cackle that summons 100 chickens in a 20-foot Emanation originating from you. These chickens appear running from a distance, digging out from the ground below, and falling from the sky in a veritable tsunami of flapping, clucking poultry. Each creature in the area (other than you) must make a DC 19 Dexterity saving throw, taking 30d6 Slashing damage on a failed save or half as much damage on a successful one. Once you’ve summoned the chickens in this way, you can’t do so again. The effects of this potion are Permanent.

name: DISAPPEARING ACT
description: When consumed, your body vanishes along with all the equipment you were wearing or carrying, and your sentience is transferred into a random object within 100 miles of you.
